message:
fix(init): sanitize auto-detected prefix for MySQL database names

Directory names starting with digits (e.g. "001" from temp dirs) are
invalid MySQL identifiers. Prepend "bd_" when the auto-detected prefix
starts with a non-alpha character.

Fixes TestInitCommand regression from ef57293e.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
